summary: Autonomous live PR inventory shard classified conservatively. No fix, merge, instant-close, or low-signal close permission is available, so actions are limited to per-PR keep decisions and exact security routing.

actions.reason: Active focused implementation PR with unresolved review/check state; no close, merge, or fix action is permitted.
Trusted-proxy Control UI auth/pairing changes are marked security-sensitive and must route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Active broad feature PR with conflicts and incomplete review; keep open for product/technical review outside this inventory shard.
Draft maintainer-owned work with explicit waiting-on-author signal and unresolved review findings; no inventory mutation is appropriate.
Focused but unmergeable PR with requested changes, failing proof, and actionable bot review; keep open for normal review/repair.
